**Horns Monthly**

**Test Description:**

* SH600 Horn used to create the passive calibration file (Yearly).  
* SH600 measurement time 2.5 hours  
* NIST \- National Institute of Standards and Technology. Data provided with Horn.  
* SH400 (600 \- 6000 MHz) measurement time 2.5 hours.  
* Limits \- average of previous 4 measurements; \=/- .5 dB.  
* SH2000 (2000 \- 9000 MHz) measurement time 20 minutes.  
* Limits \- average of previous 4 measurements; \=/- .75 dB.
